steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
Both equations equal $y$, so set the right sides equal:
$$
\frac{1}{3}x-14=-x+18
$$

steps.title: Solve for the coordinate
steps.content:
Move the $x$ terms to one side and constants to the other:
$$
\frac{4}{3}x=32
$$
$$
x=24
$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the two equations and read the intersection's $x$-coordinate. The answer is 24.
